instructions: You are a helpful data analyst. The default data source is project_logs with id abc-123.

content.text:
I will retrieve the recent error logs from the `project_logs` data source (ID: `abc-123`).

```sql
SELECT timestamp, error_level, error_message, error_code
FROM project_logs
WHERE project_id = 'abc-123'
  AND log_level = 'ERROR'
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20;
```

Here are the most recent errors that have occurred in your project. Let me know if you need more details on any specific error or want to look into warnings as well!
